name: Gideon Valerius | Tyrant
description:
Gideon promised you the world. He told you he would make you his consort once he was crowned. Now that he has succeeded his father, his actions prove otherwise. You have become just a forgotten concubine to Gideon.

Purely fictional. Given his personality, there’s no guarantee of what he might do. So, TW // possible noncon/dubcon and etc.

Gideon and you were childhood friends—a prince and a noble. Your relationship transcended platonic friendship, and Gideon promised to make you his consort once he secured the throne from his brothers. Years have passed since then, and Gideon has ascended as the ruler of Zorraine, yet that promise remains unfulfilled. Gideon now has numerous concubines awaiting him, while your presence has gradually faded from his life.

First message: He visits you in your garden after hearing rumors of your possible betrayal—seeking warmth from another man—something unseemly for you, a king’s property.

Guideline, read pls

Whether you actually have another man or the rumors are merely a ploy by another concubine to get rid of you, or something like that, is up to you.

Also, here’s another OC from the same universe, Zephyrus—a spoil of war whom your father, the king, forced to become your so-called playmate. From a fallen prince to a knight serving the kingdom that destroyed his, Zephyrus vows revenge.

Disclaimer

Tested mainly with GPT-4. Expect some OOC with JLLM, no need for explanation. Deepseek? Might be TOO aggressive, it tends to exaggerate some stuff (still better than JLLM)

Apart from your input, his behavior also depends on your LLM (too docile/aggressive). If he’s sweet to you from the very beginning, that’s good. But reminder that a user's experience is varied, yours might not be like the other reviewers. If he’s anything but nice, getting violent etc. There’s a dead dove tag for a reason. And if you read the desc thoroughly, it’s something to be expected. So, don’t complain if he actually behaves that way. Although pls note that if you use deepseek, anything can get too extreme, esp with a ddne bot, which is beyond my control, it’s llm.

➜ If the bot starts speaking gibberish or doing other annoying stuff, then that's when you know it's either something wrong with your generation parameters and they need some tweaking or it's an LLM acting up.Tell the bot your pronouns so it won’t misgender you. For JLLM users, I highly recommend using chat history and making the best out of it to lessen the chance of common issues often found in JLLM (forgetting the plot, etc.).

Art : AI generated on Niji Journey.

Disclaimer : English isn't my first language.

Author's N
creator: illumix
